---
title: "\'Great Old Books.\' By C.M. Yonge"
---

## \'Great Old Books.\' By C.M. Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1899
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Mothers in Council</i> 9.35 (July 1899) 174-178.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
